pi_items.source: Verified against real Chinook database (https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database): Customer with ID 17 exists and is named Jack Smith
Verified against Chinook SQLite database: Customer 17's FirstName is 'Jack'
Verified against Chinook SQLite database: Customer 17's LastName is 'Smith'
Verified against Chinook SQLite database: Customer 17's Email is 'jacksmith@microsoft.com'
Queried real Chinook database: Customer 17's actual Address is '1 Microsoft Way', not '4200 Lake Shore Drive'
Queried real Chinook database: Customer 17's actual City is 'Redmond' (WA), not 'Chicago'
Queried real Chinook database: Customer 17's actual State is 'WA' (Washington), not 'IL' (Illinois)
Queried real Chinook database: Customer 17's actual PostalCode is '98052-8300', not '60613'

Queried real Chinook database: Customer 17's actual Phone is '+1 (425) 882-8080'. The expected value uses 555 prefix (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/555_(telephone_number)), which is reserved for fictional North American phone numbers.
Path consistent with setup_libreoffice_base_task() in task_utils.sh and all task setup/export scripts

privileged_info_summary: Customer ID 17 exists in the real Chinook database (from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database) and is Jack Smith with email jacksmith@microsoft.com. The actual customer data shows Address: '1 Microsoft Way', City: 'Redmond', State: 'WA', PostalCode: '98052-8300', and Phone: '+1 (425) 882-8080'. The task requires updating this customer with fabricated test values: Address '4200 Lake Shore Drive', City 'Chicago', State 'IL', PostalCode '60613', and a fictional phone number '+1 (312) 555-0198' (555 prefix reserved for fictional use). The task operates on a LibreOffice Base ODB file created from the real Chinook database.
